# `dnsight dmarc generate`

Print a suggested DMARC TXT record.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--policy` / `-p` | choice | `'none'` | no | Generated record p=. |
| `--subdomain-policy` | choice | — | no | Generated sp= (optional). |
| `--pct` | integer range | `100` | no | pct= 0–100. |
| `--adkim` | choice | `'r'` | no | adkim= r\|s. |
| `--aspf` | choice | `'r'` | no | aspf= r\|s. |
| `--rua` | text | — | no | Comma-separated rua= mailto or http URIs. |
| `--ruf` | text | — | no | Comma-separated ruf= mailto or http URIs. |
